name: student-attendance-system
description: Build orchestration for the Student Attendance System Google Apps Script project.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix gas install
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run check:output && npm --prefix server run build:check && npm --prefix gas run prepare && npm --prefix gas run check:output
scripts.check:outputs: npm --prefix frontend run check:output && npm --prefix server run check:output && npm --prefix gas run check:output
scripts.push: npm run build && npm --prefix gas run push
